# UX & Metrics Requirements Checklist: UX, Charts, and Metrics Improvements

**Purpose**: Validate specification completeness and requirement quality for UX elements, input formatting, chart visual design, and statistical calculation formulas.
**Created**: 2026-06-17
**Feature**: [spec.md](file:///c:/projects/vita/specs/006-ux-charts-and-metrics/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are modal animation specifications complete for both entry and exit transitions? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [x] CHK002 Is the birthdate input formatting mask explicitly specified for both user editing and backend translation states? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK003 Are display requirements documented for cases where weight logs or blood pressure records are entirely empty? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Is "lowest weight of the last day" clearly defined to avoid ambiguity when multiple measurements are taken at different times? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]
- [x] CHK005 Are the boundaries of the 7-day and 30-day periods clearly quantified (e.g., including or excluding the current calendar day)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]
- [x] CHK006 Is the placement of the exit icon relative to the logout button label text explicitly specified? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK007 Do the X-axis time representation rules align between the Weight chart and the Blood Pressure chart? [Consistency, Spec §FR-003]
- [x] CHK008 Are the birthdate validation rules in the UI consistent with the shared database Zod validation constraints? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK009 Can the Y-axis visual contrast enhancement be objectively verified against WCAG AA requirements? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-002]
- [x] CHK010 Are the acceptance criteria for birthdate keyboard validation testable under invalid formatting inputs? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §Story 1]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK011 Are user journey flows covered for retroactively modifying weight or blood pressure dates? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §Story 2]
- [x] CHK012 Is there a defined scenario flow for handling partially formatted or incomplete keyboard inputs in the birthdate text field? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK013 Do the weight loss fallback rules define what happens if the calculated start weight search resolves to a date after the end weight date? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-007]
- [x] CHK014 Is the behavior specified when a calculation interval length in days is zero, to prevent division-by-zero errors? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-008]
- [x] CHK015 Does the spec define what should be shown on the screen if a user has exactly one weight entry? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK016 Are the timezone and locale dependencies documented for date parsing and chart X-axis rendering? [Dependencies, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK017 Are the assumptions regarding browser keyboard event support for input masking validated? [Assumptions, Spec §Assumptions]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
